metadata.source_authority: Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
metadata.source_note: Laws of Zambia chapter edition of the National Pension Scheme Act, 1996 (Act No. 40 of 1996, Cap. 256) from the National Assembly repository (text-embedded). Section 14: contributions at the prescribed percentage (employer + employee shares; s.14(4) actuarial determination). Section 19: annual adjustment of pensionable earnings by an index based on national average earnings, by statutory instrument. The prescribed 5%/5% shares live in the Pensionable Earnings Regulations chain (S.I. 22 of 2000 as amended; the amendment SIs are captured alongside).
metadata.title: National Pension Scheme Act, 1996 (Cap. 256) — contributions (s.14) and pensionable-earnings indexing (s.19)

metadata.source_authority: Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia

metadata.source_note: Assented print (text-embedded; ZambiaLII-hosted copy of the Government Printer print). Amends s.19(5) so the Authority determines national average earnings annually by applying Zambia Statistics Agency data; inserts s.19A (80% minimum pension floor) and s.21A (pre-retirement lump sum of 20% of indexed contributions). Does not touch the s.14 contribution provisions.
metadata.title: National Pension Scheme (Amendment) Act, 2023 (Act No. 1 of 2023) — s.19(5) ZamStats NAE determination; s.21A pre-retirement lump sum

metadata.source_note: Assented print (text-embedded; ZambiaLII-hosted copy of the Government Printer print). metadata.title: National Pension Scheme (Amendment) Act, 2023 (Act No. 1 of 2023) — s.19(5) ZamStats NAE determination; s.21A pre-retirement lump sum

metadata.source_note: Assented print (text-embedded; ZambiaLII-hosted copy of the Government Printer print). Section 15: the employer pays the employer's and employee's contributions at a prescribed percentage; s.15(5) the Minister prescribes rates. Section 16 exemptions (severe disability, age 65+, the poor and vulnerable). Contains no income-tax-deductibility provision.
metadata.title: National Health Insurance Act, 2018 (Act No. 2 of 2018) — s.15 contributions at a prescribed percentage; s.16 exemptions
